mapper.sql: id, student_id, total_hours, used_hours, remaining_hours, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into student_course_hour (student_id, total_hours, used_hours, remaining_hours, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentId}, #{totalHours}, #{usedHours}, #{remainingHours}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update student_course_hour set total_hours = total_hours + #{deltaTotal}, used_hours = used_hours + #{deltaUsed}, remaining_hours = remaining_hours + #{deltaRemaining}, updated_at = now() where student_id = #{studentId} and remaining_hours + #{deltaRemaining} >= 0
